---
name: Playback / audio issue
about: Report a problem with playback, audio output, or sound quality
title: '[Playback] '
labels: bug, audio
---

Audio bugs can be tricky, the more detail you can share about your setup, the faster we can chase this down. Thanks for filing!

## Your setup

- **SONE version**: <!-- e.g. 0.16.0 — find it under Settings → About, or run `sone --version` -->
- **Install source**: <!-- Flatpak, AUR, or built from source -->
- **Distro + version**: <!-- e.g. Fedora 40, Arch (rolling), Ubuntu 24.04 -->
- **Desktop / session**: <!-- e.g. GNOME 46 on Wayland, KDE Plasma 6 on X11 -->
- **GPU + driver**: <!-- e.g. NVIDIA RTX 3060 (proprietary 550.78), AMD RX 6700 (Mesa 24.0), Intel (Mesa) -->

## Audio gear

- **Output device**: <!-- e.g. USB DAC (Topping E30), HDMI, built-in speakers, Bluetooth headphones (model) -->
- **Sample rate / bit depth**: <!-- e.g. 44.1 kHz / 16-bit, 96 kHz / 24-bit, 192 kHz / 24-bit -->
- **Direct ALSA mode**: <!-- on or off — toggle in Settings → Audio -->

## What went wrong?

<!-- Describe what you're hearing (or not hearing): dropouts, distortion, wrong device, silence, sample-rate switching glitches, gapless failures, etc. -->

## What did you expect to happen?

<!-- The behavior you were hoping for. -->

## How can we reproduce it?

<!-- Steps that reliably trigger it. If it's intermittent, say so — that's a clue too. -->

1.
2.
3.

## Tracks affected

<!-- If certain tracks reproduce the bug (e.g. only Hi-Res, only a specific album, only after switching from a 96 kHz track to a 44.1 kHz one), let us know which ones. -->

## Screenshots or recordings

<!-- Short audio clips of the glitch are gold, if you can grab one. -->

## Logs

<!--
Logs help us a lot — please attach them if you can.

The current log lives at:
  ~/.config/sone/logs/sone_rCURRENT.log
Older rotated logs (sone_r*.log) sit in the same folder.

You can drag the file in here, or paste the relevant lines below.
-->

```
```

</details>

## Anything else?

<!-- Only on the first track? Only after the screen locks? Only over Bluetooth? Anything you've noticed is fair game. -->

## One last thing

- [ ] I had a quick look through [existing issues](https://github.com/lullabyX/sone/issues?q=is%3Aissue) and didn't see this one already reported.
